title: Image
description: Image component blends efficiency and aesthetics, offering lazy and priority loading for optimized performance. It features an overlay mode for visual enhancement, coupled with disabled state management for user interaction control. Advanced error handling and an empty state feature ensure seamless display and user experience, even when images are not available.

sections.title: Overlay
sections.description: The ax-overlay property in the Image component provides a color overlay, enhancing image aesthetics and text readability, perfect for diverse design needs.

sections.title: Loading and Placeholder
sections.description: You can utilize the Image component's lazy and priority loading for efficient image rendering with ax-loading, along with a placeholder feature that displays temporary visuals or text with ax-placeholder to ensuring a seamless user experience.

types.title: AXImageComponent
types.description: Main image component for displaying images with customizable settings and overlay options

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the image in pixels

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the image in pixels

props.name: overlayMode
props.description: Specifies when the image overlay should be shown

props.name: src
props.description: The URL of the image to be displayed

props.name: alt
props.description: The alternative text for the image, for accessibility purposes

props.name: lazy
props.description: Indicates if the image should be loaded lazily

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onLoad
events.description: Emitted when the image has successfully loaded

events.name: onError
events.description: Emitted when there is an error loading the image

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)
